3107290.name: Minimo
3107290.description:
Minimo throws hundreds of players into a massive world for a fast, unpredictable roguelike adventure. Every run is different, every session a race against the clock. Team up, explore, and see how far you can push in just 30 minutes. Unlock and swap between tons of classes to unleash entirely new ways to play. Fast adventures, massive parties.

GATHER YOUR FRIENDS OR MAKE NEW ONES

Play solo, with a few friends, or alongside up to 200 other players in a shared run. Join a guild to compete for high scores, race to defeat new bosses, or just jump in and have fun together.

PLAY YOUR WAY

50 different classes shape how you explore, fight, and progress. Relax with your oven mitts, inspire friends with a tune, toss fireballs, or suck the blood of your enemies.

COOPERATE TO UNLOCK NEW AREAS AND DEFEAT COLOSSAL BOSSES

Progress together to unlock new regions, introducing tougher encounters, hidden secrets, and powerful bosses.

EVERY RUN IS DIFFERENT

The world shifts with every run - with new paths, encounters, and challenges to overcome. Vote between upgrades to improve your combat skills, survival skills, or craftsmanship. Every choice you make shapes the journey - for you and everyone else.

KEY FEATURES

  • Unlock and master 50 distinct classes, each with unique abilities, roles, and playstyles.

  • Team up with other players and combine classes cooperatively to complete quests, solve puzzles, find secrets, and defeat bosses.

  • Explore procedural worlds with fresh layouts, encounters, and surprises every time you play.

  • Each run takes only 30 minutes.

  • Play solo, in small groups, or alongside up to 200 players in shared runs or as a guild.

  • Unlock pets and cosmetic outfits to personalize your character.

  • Vote between hundreds of powerful upgrades, with synergies and wild builds.

  • Everything you do helps everyone - level up together, get stronger, and push further each run.

  • Compete on guild and individual leaderboards.

  • Socialize in a customizable guild space.

  • Yes there is fishing. And cooking. And flower picking. Relax between the chaos with chill activities that still contribute to the run.
